pages.title: Overview
pages.purpose: Introduce Legend of Aetheria, a browser-based fantasy RPG, describing its purpose, architecture, and main components at a high level

pages.title: System Architecture
pages.purpose: Explain the overall system architecture, including the web server layer, application core, domain logic, and data persistence layers

pages.title: Technology Stack
pages.purpose: Document the technologies used: PHP 8.4, MariaDB, Bootstrap 5.3, jQuery, Apache, and external services like OpenAI

pages.title: Installation & Setup
pages.purpose: Comprehensive guide to installing and configuring Legend of Aetheria on various platforms

pages.title: Prerequisites
pages.purpose: List system requirements, required software packages, and preparation steps before installation

pages.title: AutoInstaller
pages.purpose: Detailed documentation of the AutoInstaller.pl script, its steps, and automated installation process

pages.title: Configuration
pages.purpose: Explain config.ini structure, template system, and how to configure database, Apache, SSL, and OpenAI settings

pages.title: Web Server Setup
pages.purpose: Document Apache virtual host configuration, SSL setup, .htaccess rules, and PHP configuration

pages.title: Core Application
pages.purpose: Document the main application entry points and request handling flow

pages.title: Entry Points
pages.purpose: Explain index.php (login/registration), game.php (main game), select.php (character selection), and battle.php (combat)

pages.title: Session Management
pages.purpose: Document PHP session handling, check_session() validation, CSRF tokens, and session security

pages.title: URL Routing
pages.purpose: Explain .htaccess URL rewriting, page parameter system, and how requests are routed to PHP controllers

pages.title: Authentication & Authorization
pages.purpose: Comprehensive security documentation covering user authentication and access control

pages.title: User Registration
pages.purpose: Document registration flow, character creation, attribute point allocation, avatar/race selection, and abuse detection

pages.title: Login System
pages.purpose: Explain login form, password verification (bcrypt), rate limiting, failed login tracking, and Google OAuth integration

pages.title: Privilege System
pages.purpose: Document privilege levels (UNVERIFIED, USER, MODERATOR, ADMINISTRATOR) and access control mechanisms

pages.title: Security Measures
pages.purpose: Detail CSRF protection, IP locking, ban system, email verification, and security best practices

pages.title: Game Systems
pages.purpose: Overview of all game mechanics and features available to players

pages.title: Character Management
pages.purpose: Document Character class, character slots, stats, inventory, bank, and character progression system

pages.title: Combat System
pages.purpose: Explain turn-based battle mechanics, monster encounters, attack/defense calculations, critical hits, and rewards

pages.title: Monster System
pages.purpose: Document Monster class, monster scaling, spawn scopes (GLOBAL/ZONE/PERSONAL), and loot drops

pages.title: Friends System
pages.purpose: Document friend relationships, request system, friend statuses (MUTUAL, BLOCKED, REQUEST_SENT/RECV), and blocking

pages.title: Mail System
pages.purpose: Explain in-game mail, folder organization (INBOX, OUTBOX, DELETED, DRAFTS), and message composition

pages.title: Inventory & Economy
pages.purpose: Document inventory system, gold/spindels currencies, bank accounts, and marketplace

pages.title: Database & Data Layer
pages.purpose: Comprehensive documentation of data persistence, ORM layer, and database architecture

pages.title: Database Schema
pages.purpose: Document all database tables (accounts, characters, monsters, familiars, mail, friends, etc.) and relationships

pages.title: PropSuite ORM
pages.purpose: Explain the PropSuite trait, PropType enum, dynamic property access (__call), and database synchronization

pages.title: Entity Classes
pages.purpose: Document Account, Character, Stats, Monster, Familiar classes and their properties/methods

pages.title: Frontend & User Interface
pages.purpose: Documentation of client-side UI components, frameworks, and JavaScript functionality

pages.title: Manual Setup
pages.purpose: Use the existing data on the repo and the autoinstaller.pl script to generate comorehensive step by step documentation explaining how to set this all up without the autoinstaller.
